feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1834 201 1633 79
TR 1686 172 1514 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts

  • Price：0

entry.title: Code Blue – CPR & ACLS Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. # Core Features # DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality # Fully Customizable for Your Practice # CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour # First Responder & Post-Code Tools # FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review # Evidence-Based Flowcharts # ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines # Built for Healthcare Professionals # Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. # Support & Legal # For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Subnautica
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

Application Description

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!* Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you! Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time. Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. FEATURES • SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore. • EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems. • SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items. • CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. • DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive? • CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE • Revamped interface – exclusive mobile UI with complete touch control • Game Center achievements • Cloud Save – Share your progress between iOS devices • Compatible with MFi controllers • iPhone 16 Optimization (including Pro Max) ----- *DEVICES NOT SUPPORTED (THE GAME WON'T WORK)*: - iPhone Xr, iPhone SE Gen 2 (2020) - iPad Mini Gen 5, iPad Air Gen 3, iPad Gen 8, iPad Gen 9 *SUPPORTED DEVICES ON LOW RESOLUTION ONLY*: - iPhone Xs, iPhone Xs Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone SE Gen 3 (2022) - iPad Pro 10.5", iPad Mini Gen 6, iPad Air Gen 4, iPad Gen 10, iPad Pro 11" Gen 1, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 3 *SUPPORTED DEVICES* : - iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 14 AND ABOVE - iPad Pro 11" Gen 2, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 4, iPad Air Gen 5, iPad Pro 11" Gen 3, iPad Pro 11" Gen 4, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 5, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 6 AND ABOVE

entry.title: Cluedo
entry.summary:
Whispering Pines Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
Black Adder Resort Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺34,99

In-App Purchases

  • Ultimate Edition Upgrade：₺499,99
  • Ultimate Edition Sale：₺399,99
  • Welcome Offer：₺999,99
  • Legacy Suspect Pack：₺799,99
  • Suspects Bundle：₺1.499,99
  • Ultimate Edition：₺1.999,99
  • PolarStation Crime SceneBundle：₺249,99
  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺249,99
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺249,99
  • Epic Crime Collection content：₺999,99

Application Description

Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery. Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective. In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective! HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime! 2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! FEATURES - THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! - A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once. - MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. - ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: AMood - 你的健康生活好伙伴
entry.id: AMood - 你的健康生活好伙伴-tr-1773095834409
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 包年会员：₺899,99 → ₺799,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺899,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 包月会员：₺79,99
  • 永久会员：₺999,99
  • 包年会员：₺799,99

Application Description

Welcome to AMood, your healthy living companion on Apple Watch. Effortlessly track your mental state and physical stress, quickly check sleep, basal metabolism, hydration, caffeine intake, and more — helping you stay in tune with your body and live a healthier life. ◎ How AMood Can Help You In this fast-paced world, we often keep spinning without stopping to listen to ourselves. Fatigue and anxiety creep in quietly, yet we struggle to pinpoint why. We believe understanding your mind and body is the key to finding your ideal life rhythm. AMood was built on this belief — through precise analysis, it helps you take better care of yourself. For example: - Busy rushing a project for hours? The app reminds you via your watch that energy is dropping — time for a tea break and a stretch; - After a full day of meetings feeling anxious? It alerts you that your mood index is low — step outside for some sunshine and a walk; - Wake up feeling down? Open the app and discover poor sleep quality was the cause. A little more sunshine or a midday nap can help recharge; - Check weekly trends and notice your mood rises after exercising with friends. Life's hint: happiness hides in simple things; - Under high pressure? Check your mind-body calendar to find your golden hours. Do the right things at the right time — let productivity and health go hand in hand. ◎ Core Features Stress used to be measured by a single HRV metric, but life is far more complex. AMood pioneered dual-dimension analysis, independently monitoring physical stress and mental state for more accurate insights. - Dual-Dimension Monitoring: Independently tracks physical energy and emotional fluctuations for precise analysis - Comprehensive Data: Integrates sleep, heart rate, body temperature, sunlight, gait, and more for a full health picture - Smart Reminders: Real-time mind-body monitoring with timely reminders to rest and adjust - Trend Insights: Discover your optimal routines and work rhythms - Habit Building: Log exercise, hydration, caffeine intake, and more to support health management - Licensed Themes: Multiple officially licensed IP collaborations, adding fun to health management AMood goes beyond single moments — it uncovers patterns in your life. By analyzing sleep, heart rate, temperature, and more, it paints your unique life rhythm. Behind every data point lies the secret to a better life. We believe taking care of yourself should be filled with warmth and joy. ◎ Apple Health Integration AMood integrates with Apple Health and requires read and write permissions. ◎ Subscription Pricing and Terms We offer three options: one-time purchase, monthly auto-renewal, and annual auto-renewal. Subscriptions auto-renew through your Apple iTunes account after confirmation and payment. To unsubscribe, turn off auto-renewal in iTunes / Apple ID settings at least 24 hours before the current period ends. If not cancelled during the trial, the subscription activates and charges automatically at trial's end. ◎ Privacy Protection User health data is stored only locally and in the user's own iCloud. ◎ Disclaimer AMood is not a medical device and cannot diagnose, treat, or prevent diseases. All information provided should not be considered medical advice. Please consult a doctor if you have concerns about your health. ◎ User Agreement and Privacy Policy User Agreement https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use Privacy Policy https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Cluedo
entry.summary:
Whispering Pines Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
Black Adder Resort Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]

All Price Information

  • Welcome Offer：₺999,99
  • Legacy Suspect Pack：₺799,99
  • Suspects Bundle：₺1.499,99
  • Ultimate Edition：₺1.999,99
  • PolarStation Crime SceneBundle：₺249,99
  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺249,99
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺249,99
  • Epic Crime Collection content：₺999,99

Application Description

Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery. Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective. In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective! HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime! 2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! FEATURES - THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! - A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once. - MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. - ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Genius Scan Enterprise - PDF
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Genius Scan Ultra：₺1.799,99 → ₺199,99 [₺199,99 ~ ₺2.299,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺2.499,99

In-App Purchases

  • Genius Scan Ultra：₺199,99
  • Super Large Tip：₺499,99
  • Generous Tip：₺149,99
  • Small Tip：₺49,99

Application Description

Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files. *** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses *** Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents. “Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com “Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian == ENTERPRISE EDITION == Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan: - All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed). Managed Configuration: - Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool - Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials) - Control of which apps and services users can export documents to - No ads == KEY FEATURES == Smart Scanning: - Document detection & background removal - Distortion correction - Shadow removal and defect cleanup - Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo) - Batch scanning PDF Creation & Editing: - Document merging & splitting - Multiple page PDF creation - Photos and PDF import Security & Privacy: - On-device document processing + Face ID locking + PDF password encryption Document Organization: - Document tagging - Metadata and content search + Smart document renaming (custom templates, …) + Backup and multi-device sync with Genius Cloud (separate subscription) Export: - Email + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. + Any WebDAV compatible service such as Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. + Automatic background auto-export OCR (Text Recognition): + Text extraction + Searchable PDF creation + Business card scanning & contact creation == ABOUT US == It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. We take pride in crafting apps that help millions of users throughout the world and hold ourselves to the highest standards in terms of quality and privacy. Get in touch with us @thegrizzlylabs if you have any questions. == PRICING & LEGAL == You can subscribe to Genius Cloud for backup & synchronization. In that case, Genius Scan’s store displays the duration and price of each subscription, updated at the time of purchase. Payment will be charged to iTunes account when the order is confirmed. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off no later than 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions, disable auto-renewal in the iTunes account settings. https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

entry.title: Cat Quest II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Enjoy this former Apple Arcade game, now on the App Store. CAT QUEST II is a 2D open-world action-RPG set in a fantasy realm of cats and dogs. Under threat from a continuing war between the cats of Felingard and the advancing dogs of the Lupus Empire, CAT QUEST II tells the tail of two kings, brought together against their will, on a journey of paw-some discovery to reclaim their thrones. Play as both a cat and dog as you explore their kingdoms solo or with a friend! Quest in a world filled with magic, curious monsters, and go on a catventure like never before! Following the success of the acclaimed CAT QUEST, developers The Gentlebros return to the world of Felingard to expand on the original with more explosive spells, expanded weapon options, an exciting new character switch mechanic, and local co-op! Features - Brand new story set in the world of Felingard - and beyond! - All new switch and co-op gameplay. Play as both cat and dog, either alone or with a friend! - New weapons types – Master swords, staves and more to become a fur-midable fighter! - More spells bring even more furry judgement to your foes. - New passive abilities, whose attributes can be mixed and combined for endless paw-sibilities! - Exciting, and varied dungeons filled with new traps and obstacles, making every pounce into the unknown a fresh experience! - Em-bark on a litany of side quests, each telling its own story and expanding the lore and universe of CAT QUEST! Go on the ultimutt catventure today!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Farming Simulator 20
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺80,00 [₺80,00 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺80,00

In-App Purchases

  • 1'000'000 Coins：₺149,99
  • 200'000 Coins：₺49,99
  • 500'000 Coins：₺99,99

Application Description

Step into the exciting world of farming with Farming Simulator 20! Harvest many different crops, tend to your livestock of pigs, cows, and sheep, and now ride your own horses, letting you explore the vast land around your farm in a brand-new way. Sell your products in a dynamic market to earn money which you can invest in additional machinery and the expansion of your farm. In Farming Simulator 20 you take control of over 100 vehicles and tools faithfully recreated from leading brands in the industry. For the first time on mobile platforms this includes John Deere, the largest agriculture machinery company in the world. Drive other famous farming brands such as Case IH, New Holland, Challenger, Fendt, Massey Ferguson, Valtra, Krone, Deutz-Fahr and many more. Farming Simulator 20 features a new North American environment in which to develop and expand your farm. Enjoy many exciting farming activities, including new machinery and crops with cotton and oats. Features of Farming Simulator 20 include: • Use over 100 realistic vehicles and tools from some of the biggest agriculture machine makers • Plant and harvest different crops: Wheat, barley, oat, canola, sunflowers, soybean, corn, potatoes, sugar beet and cotton • Feed your cows and sheep to produce and sell milk and wool • Take care of horses and ride on them to freely explore the world around your farm • New 3D graphics show even more detail on your machinery and the Northern American environment • Cockpit view lets you drive in your vehicles in an even more realistic way than before

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Onyx Magic
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Onyx Print：₺4.999,99 → ₺2.499,99 [₺2.499,99 ~ ₺4.999,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺3.499,99

In-App Purchases

  • Onyx Print：₺2.499,99
  • 100 Onyx Credits：₺999,99

Application Description

Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data. Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera. For example: — Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet. — Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal. — Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought. — Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal. — Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye. — Change the time on a photo of a clock. — Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier. ...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it. Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice. * Variable Delayed Input Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken. * Cutting Edge Technology Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely. * Create Unlimited Effects Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took. * Your Integrations. Their Camera The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket. * Invisible, Advanced Technology As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous. * Third Party Integrations Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including: — Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input — Native voice input — Native clock swipe input — WebFX's Wrist Gestures — WikiTest — PeekSmith — Bridge ...and any compatible third-party app. # Introducing: Onyx Print Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world. # Produce Physical Photographs Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending. # Dynamic Prompting Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx. Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match. # Use Your Own Photos You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal. # Works With Other Apps Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it. Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future. Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits. Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
